meaning: n.专门研究狄更斯(英国小说家)者,崇拜狄更斯者adj.狄更斯的
examples: The roar from this Dickensian forge in the port of Penang is part of a greater reverberation across Asia.
With vivid brass bellpulls, a poor man might walk here as a Dickensian child put its face to a windowpane.
The case of Marshall v Marshall, a name suitably Dickensian, started almost as soon as Marshall died in 1995.
This is the Dickensian era for America's largest minority, representing both the best of times and the worst of times.
